summary: Comprehensive testing of three new features: GDPR Cookie Banner, Custom 404 Page, and React.lazy() code splitting. All 12 test requirements PASSED. Features work correctly in both light and dark mode, and on mobile.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Cookie banner appears on first visit (bottom-right corner) after 1.5s delay
2. PASS: Cookie banner has 'Accepteren' and 'Alleen noodzakelijk' buttons
3. PASS: Cookie banner does NOT appear again after clicking either button (persists in localStorage as 'cookie_consent')
4. PASS: Cookie banner links to /privacy page via 'Privacybeleid' link - navigation works
5. PASS: Cookie banner works in dark mode (dark background rgb(23,23,23), white text rgb(255,255,255))
6. PASS: 404 page shows for non-existent routes (/niet-bestaand, /random-page-xyz) with '404' watermark
7. PASS: 404 page shows 'Pagina niet gevonden' heading and 'Terug naar home' button
8. PASS: 404 page 'Terug naar home' button navigates to homepage
9. PASS: 404 page works in dark mode (white heading text rgb(255,255,255), dark background)
10. PASS: 404 page shows correct Yrvante logo (dark logo visible in light mode, white logo visible in dark mode)
11. PASS: Homepage still loads correctly (not lazy loaded - LandingPage imported directly)
12. PASS: Calculator page loads correctly via lazy loading
13. PASS: Packages page loads correctly via lazy loading
14. PASS: Cookie banner is responsive on mobile (full-width 358px on 390px viewport)
15. PASS: Close button (X) on cookie banner sets consent to 'necessary' and hides banner
critical_code_review_comments: CookieBanner.jsx: Well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes, localStorage persistence, and dark mode support
NotFoundPage.jsx: Clean implementation with animated entrance, proper logo switching for dark/light mode
App.js: Correct React.lazy() implementation - LandingPage is NOT lazy loaded (imported directly), all other pages use lazy()
Suspense fallback PageLoader provides good UX during lazy loading
Cookie banner z-index (9000) ensures it appears above other content
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21: Three new features fully tested. (1) CookieBanner: appears 1.5s after page load on first visit, saves to localStorage 'cookie_consent' ('all' or 'necessary'), has Accepteren/Alleen noodzakelijk buttons and Privacybeleid link to /privacy. (2) NotFoundPage: catch-all route for non-existent pages, shows 404 watermark, 'Pagina niet gevonden' heading, 'Terug naar home' button. (3) React.lazy(): all pages except LandingPage are lazy loaded with Suspense PageLoader spinner. To test cookie banner: remove 'cookie_consent' from localStorage. To skip ThemeChooser: set 'theme_chosen' to 'true'. data-testid attributes: cookie-banner, cookie-accept-all, cookie-accept-necessary, cookie-close, not-found-page, not-found-home-btn.
